message:
🌱 jaeger: query error after run es_indices_clean.sh (#1226)

* 🌱 Add jaeger: query error after run es_indices_clean.sh mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct jaeger namespace to observability

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-622-query-error-after-run-es-indices-clean-sh",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: query error after run es_indices_clean.sh",
+    "description": "query error after run es_indices_clean.sh. This issue affects 7+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify jaeger troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your jaeger deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\njaeger version: cba413ede300564e6f92a16f812604e4a829d0c7\nstorage: elasticsearch 6.1.1, Build: bd92e7f/2017-12-17T20:23:25.338Z, JVM: 9.0.1\n\nIt's work before clean."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for query error after run es_indices_clean.sh",
+        "description": "Instead of creating indices with mapping the collector at start time creates index template. ES uses this index template when a data is inserted to ES.\n\nTODO\n```yaml\n⋊> ~/opt ./es_indices_clean.sh 0 localhost:9200                                                                                                                                                             \nInstalling python dependencies required for curator...\nRequirement already satisfied: elasticsearch in /usr/local/lib/python2.7/dist-packages\nRequirement already satisfied: elasticsearch-curator in /usr/local/lib/python2.7/dist-packages\nRequirement already satisfied: urllib3<1.23,>=1.21.1 in /usr/local/lib/python2.7/dist-packages (from elasticsearch)\nRequirement already satisfied: click>=6.7 \n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm query error after run es_indices_clean.sh is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Instead of creating indices with mapping the collector at start time creates index template. ES uses this index template when a data is inserted to ES.\n\nTODO",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "⋊> ~/opt ./es_indices_clean.sh 0 localhost:9200                                                                                                                                                             \nInstalling python dependencies required for curator...\nRequirement already satisfied: elasticsearch in /usr/local/lib/python2.7/dist-packages\nRequirement already satisfied: elasticsearch-curator in /usr/local/lib/python2.7/dist-packages\nRequirement already satisfied: urllib3<1.23,>=1.21.1 in /usr/local/lib/python2.7/dist-packages (from elasticsearch)\nRequirement already satisfied: click>=6.7 in /usr/local/lib/python2.7/dist-packages (from elasticsearch-curator)\nRequirement already satisfied: pyyaml>=3.10 in /usr/local/lib/python2.7/dist-packages (from elasticsearch-curator)\nRequirement al",
+        "There was an error querying for traces:\nHTTP Error: Search service failed: elastic: Error 400 (Bad Request): all shards failed [type=search_phase_execution_exception]\n\nStatus | 500\nStatus text | Internal Server Error\nURL | /api/services\nResponse body | {   \"data\": null,   \"total\": 0,   \"limit\": 0,   \"offset\": 0,   \"errors\": [     {       \"code\": 500,       \"msg\": \"Search service failed: elastic: Error 400 (Bad Request): all shards failed [type=search_phase_execution_exception]\"     }   ] }",
+        "/api/services\n service failed: elastic: Error 400 (Bad Request): all shards failed [type=search_phase_execution_exception]\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "jaeger",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "jaeger"
+    ],

+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/issues/622",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/pull/1627"
+    },
+    "reactions": 7,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with jaeger installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
